name: Lyndon B. Johnson
title: Lyndon B. Johnson - taken about a week before his death on1/22/73, 64
description: Lyndon B. Johnson - taken about a week before his death on1/22/73, 64
bio: Lyndon B. Johnson was the 36th President of the United States. He championed landmark legislation including the Civil Rights Act, the Voting Rights Act, and Medicare.
